window.title: DalamudMCP Settings
header.subtitle: Live bridge for FFXIV observations, actions, and MCP exposure.
header.hint: The top row is for runtime health. The bottom half is for operations browsing and copy-ready commands.
language.label: Language
runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.subtitle: Connection health, discovery, and exposure posture.
runtime.enable_actions_hint: Observation tools stay live. Actions remain default-off until you explicitly expose them here.
runtime.enable_unsafe_hint: Unsafe tools can invoke arbitrary plugin IPC functions. Leave them off unless you are deliberately debugging another plugin.
quick.title: Command Desk
quick.subtitle: Copy the two entrypoints people need most often.
quick.cli_desc: Reads the live player snapshot from the active plugin instance.
quick.mcp_desc: Starts the local MCP bridge with the plugin-discovered live pipe.
server.title: HTTP Server
server.subtitle: Stable MCP endpoint for clients that should not care about pipe names.
server.auto_start: Start MCP HTTP Server automatically on plugin load
operations.title: Operations
operations.subtitle: Filter the exported surface before you hand the plugin to another client.
operations.empty: No operations matched the current filter.
status.exposure_unsafe_pending: Exposure: disabled until unsafe operations are enabled
status.exposure_action_pending: Exposure: disabled until action operations are enabled
